input.command:
# Test both codes
TYPED_CODE="f0da9201"
ARTIFACTS_CODE="f0da9201"

echo "Validating codes..."
echo "Typed output code: $TYPED_CODE"
echo "Artifacts code: $ARTIFACTS_CODE"
echo ""

# Validate hex format for typed code
echo "Checking typed code format..."
echo "$TYPED_CODE" | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{8}$' && echo "Typed code: VALID" || echo "Typed code: INVALID"

# Validate hex format for artifacts code
echo "Checking artifacts code format..."
echo "$ARTIFACTS_CODE" | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{8}$' && echo "Artifacts code: VALID" || echo "Artifacts code: INVALID"

# Check if codes match
echo ""
echo "Checking if codes match..."
if [ "$TYPED_CODE" = "$ARTIFACTS_CODE" ]; then
  echo "Codes MATCH: Both contain f0da9201"
else
  echo "Codes DO NOT MATCH"
fi
